nasb.text: his sons and his grandsons with him, his daughters and his granddaughters, and all his descendants he brought with him to Egypt.

esv.text: his sons, and his sons’ sons with him, his daughters, and his sons’ daughters. All his offspring he brought with him into Egypt.

cnv.text: 雅各把他的眾兒子、孫子、女兒、孫女和他所有的後裔，都一同帶到埃及去了。

ccb.text: 就是他的儿子、孙子、女儿和孙女一起去了埃及。

csbs.text: 这样，雅各带着他的儿子、孙子、女儿、孙女，他所有的子孙，一同来到了埃及。
